issues.description: DrawCard action missing count specification for the second part: 'trash 2 cards from your hand' requires TrashFromHand with count:2, but current DSL has empty filter and no count parameter

Extraneous second effect with trigger:'Trigger' and action PlaySelf is not supported by card text. Only [On Play] Draw 2 cards and trash 2 cards from your hand is described; no self-play mechanic exists

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Draw 2 cards and trash 2 cards from your hand.
